title: 温病四书公共底本与转录校勘见证

retrieval.method: HTTP GET with redirects and a browser-compatible user agent; Wikisource was read through its public MediaWiki parse API
retrieval.hashMeaning: SHA256 and bytes identify the exact HTML or JSON response retrieved for this audit; dynamic pages may produce a different response hash later.
retrieval.archivalBoundary: Only transformed metadata and short public-domain passage witnesses are stored here; fetched HTML and JSON remain outside the repository.

witnesses.locator: work metadata; 察舌; 論濕邪
witnesses.supports: Identifies the text as 葉桂口述、顧景文等錄 and states that the edition is excerpted from the Peking University Library scan of 溫熱經緯, with 周氏醫學叢書 also consulted. It reads 舌脹大不能出口 and 救陰不在血而在津汗.
witnesses.excerpt: 舌脹大不能出口者；救陰不在血，而在津汗
witnesses.limitations: This is an edited transcription assembled from identified witnesses, not a diplomatic transcription of one print.

witnesses.locator: 華岫雲本; 察舌; 論濕邪
witnesses.supports: Independently reads 舌脹大不能出口 and 救陰不在血而在津汗. It does not contain 先自彷徨, demonstrating that the public versions are not character-identical.
witnesses.excerpt: 舌脹大不能出口者；救陰不在血，而在津汗
witnesses.limitations: The page includes modern editorial framing and represents one public recension, not a universal base text.

witnesses.locator: 北京大學圖書館掃描本; 葉香巖外感溫熱篇; 薛生白濕熱病篇
witnesses.supports: Identifies 王士雄 and the Peking University Library scan. It records 先自彷徨 with a 唐本 variant, 救陰不在血而在津與汗 with another 唐本 variant, and visibly separates 雄按、汪按、楊云、徐洄溪等 later commentary from transmitted base text.
witnesses.excerpt: 先自彷徨矣；救陰不在血，而在津與汗；雄按：徐洄溪云
witnesses.limitations: This is a nineteenth-century anthology and commentary layer. A match in it must be attributed to base text, recension note, or later commentator rather than automatically to 葉桂 or 薛雪.

witnesses.locator: full work wikitext; clauses 一 through 四十六
witnesses.supports: Labels the work 清薛雪著、自注 and notes that 溫熱經緯 includes it as 濕熱病篇. The retrieved wikitext contains 46 numbered clauses.
witnesses.excerpt: 清 薛雪 著、自注；《溫熱經緯》收錄為「濕熱病篇」
witnesses.limitations: The 46-clause public text does not settle the authorship of every annotation or later-added clause; 溫熱經緯 itself flags recension and interpolation concerns.

witnesses.locator: 粤東惠濟倉重刊本 linked to CUHK and Library of Congress copies; selected passages
witnesses.supports: Reads 凡暑傷肺經氣分之輕證皆可用之 and 餓不死的傷寒、撐不死的痢疾. It restores context-specific characters hidden by the local placeholders: 䐜脹, 㿗疝, 䗪蟲, and 𤺏.
witnesses.excerpt: 肺經氣分之輕證；撐不死的痢疾；䐜脹；㿗疝；䗪蟲；𤺏
witnesses.limitations: The page is an edited transcription tied to identified scans. Rare-character readings remain edition-specific until the scan image is independently inspected.

witnesses.supports: Identifies 吳鞠通 as author and the edition as the 六安涂氏求我齋所刊書 copy.
witnesses.excerpt: 作者：吳鞠通；版本：《六安涂氏求我齋所刊書》本
witnesses.limitations: Index metadata establishes work and edition identity but does not by itself resolve the selected character readings.
